raw_resume_text: LISA NALEPA Mount Clemens, MI | 586-219-3547 | lisamnalepa@gmail.com Professional Summary Operations & Site Leadership Professional with 15+ years of experience directing high-volume teams, managing workforce scheduling, overseeing compliance, and maintaining financial accountability. Proven ability to lead daily operations exceeding $1M in revenue, optimize labor efficiency, improve workflow systems, and strengthen team performance. Core Competencies Operations & Site Management, Workforce Planning & Scheduling, Budget Monitoring & Cost Control, Labor & Payroll Oversight, Safety & Regulatory Compliance, Process Improvement & Efficiency, Vendor & Stakeholder Communication, Performance Management & Coaching, Inventory & Resource Oversight, Microsoft Office, Excel, Salesforce, Jira, Power BI, QuickBooks. Professional Experience Refresh + Reset, LLC — Owner / Operations Manager Aug 2024 – Present Direct end-to-end service operations; scheduling, budgeting, vendor coordination, performance oversight; onboarding systems; workflow systems; reporting; labor forecasting; procurement; billing; expense tracking; subcontractor coordination; client retention. Costco Wholesale — Operations Supervisor / Administrative & Safety Lead Jul 2018 – Aug 2024 Supervised 20–30 employees in high-volume department; workforce scheduling; SOP compliance; payroll processing; labor allocation; safety audits; OSHA compliance; financial reconciliation; operational issue resolution; marketing support. Vanity — Store Manager 2007 – 2010 Store operations; scheduling; payroll; inventory; budgeting; staff recruitment and training; revenue growth; performance coaching. Journeys Shoes — Store Manager 2003 – 2005 Hiring and training; sales growth; inventory control; KPI management; daily operations. Education Macomb Community College – Business Coursework. Professional Development Foundation in Project Management – Coursera; Jira Certificate – Coursera.
